description: You are a backend web developer at a retail company preparing for a major frontend migration to a new GraphQL API. Fix five critical issues in the Node.js Apollo GraphQL server located at /home/ga/workspace/graphql_api/. Ensure product prices are returned in dollars (Float) instead of cents (integers). Handle NULL product descriptions by returning 'No description available' instead of crashing. Implement the missing 'User.fullName' field in the resolvers. Prevent orders with negative quantities by throwing a GraphQLError with the message 'Quantity must be greater than zero'. Resolve the N+1 database query bottleneck occurring when querying categories and their nested products.
